2026-03-13TCCanada Marine ActReappointment of a director of the Trois-Rivières Port AuthorityReappointment of Guylaine Laporte of Trois-Rivières, Quebec, as a director of the Trois-Rivières Port Authority, to hold office for a term ending on May 8, 2028.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a director of the Trois-Rivières Port Authority
precis: Reappointment of Guylaine Laporte of Trois-Rivières, Quebec, as a director of the Trois-Rivières Port Authority, to hold office for a term ending on May 8, 2028.
